verses.text: In the third year of Cyrus, Daniel mourns three full weeks, eating no pleasant bread. Sustained seeking. Earnest prayer is sometimes a long and costly labour.
In the third year of Cyrus, Daniel mourns three full weeks, eating no pleasant bread. Sustained seeking. Earnest prayer is sometimes a long and costly labour.
In the third year of Cyrus, Daniel mourns three full weeks, eating no pleasant bread. Sustained seeking. Earnest prayer is sometimes a long and costly labour.
By the river he sees 'a certain man clothed in linen,' his face as lightning, his eyes as lamps of fire. A glorious appearing. The vision recalls the majesty of the Lord Himself.
By the river he sees 'a certain man clothed in linen,' his face as lightning, his eyes as lamps of fire. A glorious appearing. The vision recalls the majesty of the Lord Himself.
By the river he sees 'a certain man clothed in linen,' his face as lightning, his eyes as lamps of fire. A glorious appearing. The vision recalls the majesty of the Lord Himself.
Only Daniel sees it; the others flee, and his strength fails as he falls into a deep sleep. Overwhelmed. The presence of glory lays the strongest low.
Only Daniel sees it; the others flee, and his strength fails as he falls into a deep sleep. Overwhelmed. The presence of glory lays the strongest low.
Only Daniel sees it; the others flee, and his strength fails as he falls into a deep sleep. Overwhelmed. The presence of glory lays the strongest low.

A hand touches him: 'Fear not, Daniel... from the first day that thou didst set thine heart to understand... thy words were heard.' Heard from the first. God notes the very beginning of a praying heart.

A hand touches him: 'Fear not, Daniel... from the first day that thou didst set thine heart to understand... thy words were heard.' Heard from the first. God notes the very beginning of a praying heart.

A hand touches him: 'Fear not, Daniel... from the first day that thou didst set thine heart to understand... thy words were heard.' Heard from the first. God notes the very beginning of a praying heart.
The 'prince of... Persia' withstood him twenty-one days till Michael came to help; now he is come to give understanding. Unseen conflict. Behind the delay of answers lies a spiritual war.
The 'prince of... Persia' withstood him twenty-one days till Michael came to help; now he is come to give understanding. Unseen conflict. Behind the delay of answers lies a spiritual war.
Daniel is speechless; one touches his lips, and he confesses his sorrows have left him no strength. Human weakness. The servant of God feels his own frailty before the heavenly.
Daniel is speechless; one touches his lips, and he confesses his sorrows have left him no strength. Human weakness. The servant of God feels his own frailty before the heavenly.
Daniel is speechless; one touches his lips, and he confesses his sorrows have left him no strength. Human weakness. The servant of God feels his own frailty before the heavenly.
One like a man strengthens him: 'O man greatly beloved, fear not... be strong'; and he is strengthened. Tender encouragement. God's beloved are revived by His word of peace.
One like a man strengthens him: 'O man greatly beloved, fear not... be strong'; and he is strengthened. Tender encouragement. God's beloved are revived by His word of peace.
The messenger returns to fight the prince of Persia and will show what is written; 'Michael your prince' stands with him. Heaven's care. God's angels contend for His people's good.
